## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss plans for Hank's ambitious "eclipse cruise" project and strategize content creation for dgraph.io](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hank aims to charter a cruise ship to view a total solar eclipse, requiring significant upfront costs](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [They will start publishing GraphQL content on dgraph.io's existing blog, adapting it to mention Dgraph](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Marcel will build workflows using AI tools like Anthropic's Claude to assist with research, outlining, and content writing](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

## Topics

### Eclipse Cruise Project

  - [Hank's motivation is to provide an ideal eclipse viewing experience without weather uncertainty](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Requires raising \~$5 million upfront to secure the cruise ship](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Initial plan is to sell to friends/family first, then open it up if successful](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Aims to at least break even, but the real goal is the incredible experience](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Hank is exploring ways to de-risk the large upfront costs](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Content Strategy for dgraph.io

  - [Previous attempts at technical GraphQL content received feedback about being too long, redundant, or missing Dgraph specifics](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Decided to start publishing on the existing dgraph.io blog, adapting content to mention Dgraph](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [Marcel will build AI-assisted workflows for research, outlining, writing while aiming for a more natural voice](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Will use examples of well-written technical intros/sections to train the AI](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Can start publishing quickly this way, then iterate on improving content quality](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Marcel will request Webflow access for dgraph.io's blog](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
  - [Explore image generation options like Midjourney for visuals](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Marcel will rework the content workflow using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [Start publishing content on the dgraph.io blog, adapting it to mention Dgraph](https://fathom.video/share/vYEpBfGzDhEwtDsnR35FJsGo5cfZyHtx?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
